decision.summary: Hold the weekly 64k dip position and open a new daily 68k dip Yes position.
decision.rationale: The existing weekly `will-bitcoin-dip-to-64k-march-30-april-5` Yes position is weak but still above the 20% stop-loss threshold at 26.0%, so it should be held for now. Beecthor’s latest transcript and summaries remain macro bearish while still allowing a final sweep toward roughly 68.8k-69k before continuation lower; Binance at 68483.49 confirms that squeeze is still active. Under nearest-strike-first, the closest daily bearish strike below price is `will-bitcoin-dip-to-68k-on-april-1`, and its 57.0% Yes probability sits in the preferred range, making it the cleanest conservative entry aligned with the thesis.

details.market: Will Bitcoin dip to $68,000 on April 1?
